title: Font Property TextObj
description: Sets and confirms the type face of characters rendered as a Text object.
notes:
The Font property can be accessed from the Property list of the Object window.
  Click the Font property Value Field.

You can make changes to the font type face in the Font property. Changeable items include the FontName, FontSize, FontBold and FontItalic. All fonts installed on your PC are available for selection in "FontName".

Vision Objects: Font Property
